projectDescription: A lightweight, modular Wayland desktop shell built with GTK4, Adwaita, and Lua for minimal desktop experiences.
keyFeatures: Modular Wayland shell with GTK4 and Gtk-Layer-Shell
Dynamic wallpaper-based theming with light/dark mode
Customizable dashboard with calendar, weather, and system monitoring
Music player integration with album art and playback controls
Bottom taskbar with pinned applications and system status
Sway window manager integration with dynamic gap control
publicApiSurface: main.lua - Application entry point and shell initialization
dashboard.lua - Dashboard widget creation and management
calendario.lua - Calendar widget with auto-updating date display
libs/theme.lua - Dynamic theme management using matugen
libs/system_i.lua - System information (CPU, RAM, disk, battery)
libs/weather.lua - Weather data fetching and display
